name: Autodesk Platform Services MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server by Autodesk Platform Services (APS/Forge) expert petrbroz enabling AI agents to interact with Autodesk's cloud platform — accessing BIM 360/ACC construction projects, viewing 3D models, querying design data, managing project files, accessing model derivatives, and integrating Autodesk's design intelligence into agent workflows.
use_cases: Querying BIM project data and model metadata from construction management agents
Accessing and analyzing 3D model properties from engineering agents
Managing Autodesk construction project documents from project management agents
Extracting design data and quantities from BIM models from estimation agents
Monitoring construction project progress from AEC industry agents
not_for: Teams not using Autodesk products (BIM 360, Revit, AutoCAD)
Direct CAD file editing (APS is a cloud API, not desktop CAD)
Organizations without Autodesk subscriptions and APS API access
best_when: An AEC (Architecture, Engineering, Construction) team using Autodesk's platform wants AI agents to query BIM data, access project documents, and analyze 3D model information — petrbroz is a respected Autodesk developer advocate.
avoid_when: Your team uses Bentley, Trimble, or other AEC platforms — APS is Autodesk-specific. Also requires Autodesk subscriptions.

auth.notes: Autodesk Platform Services client ID and client secret required. OAuth 2.0 with 2-legged (server-to-server) or 3-legged (user auth) flows. Register app at aps.autodesk.com.

pricing.free_tier_limits: APS Developer account: 5,000 tokens/month free on most APIs
pricing.paid_tiers: APS usage-based pricing per API call; Autodesk subscriptions required for project data
pricing.notes: APS developer tier is free with monthly token allowance. Production use requires Autodesk product subscriptions (BIM 360, ACC). MCP server is free open source from petrbroz.

performance.rate_limits: APS API: rate limits per API, generally 100+ req/min for most endpoints

known_agent_gotchas: APS OAuth token expiry requires token refresh handling — implement token management
BIM model translation (Forge Viewer derivatives) is async and takes time for large models
Different API versions (v2, v3) may have different auth requirements
petrbroz is a Autodesk developer advocate — high quality implementation with APS expertise
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS. OAuth 2.0. BIM project data includes architectural and construction IP — sensitive. Scope tokens to minimum required access. Autodesk's enterprise security compliance applies.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS + OAuth 2.0. BIM/architectural data is sensitive IP. Scope tokens appropriately. Autodesk enterprise security (SOC2/ISO27001). From knowledgeable Autodesk developer.
